page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.gn5i-c28g1.14xlarge is a GPU-accelerated server instance belonging to the ecs.gn5i server family. It is built on the x86_64 CPU architecture and features 56 dedicated physical cores with 56 vCPUs, operating with a 1.0 thread-per-core configuration. The instance is equipped with 224.0 GB of system memory, providing a ratio of 4.0 GB of RAM per core.

For hardware acceleration, this instance integrates two NVIDIA P4 GPUs, delivering a total of 16 GB of VRAM. It does not include local storage, meaning all storage requirements must be met via network-attached options. Network connectivity is supported by a baseline bandwidth of 10 Gbps. The system runs on the KVM hypervisor.

Given the dual NVIDIA P4 GPU configuration and dedicated CPU resources, this instance is designed for workloads requiring parallel processing capabilities. Appropriate use cases include GPU-accelerated database operations, machine learning inference, video transcoding, and parallelized data processing tasks.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.gn5i-c28g1.14xlarge is a GPU-accelerated instance from the ecs.gn5i family, running on the KVM hypervisor with an x86_64 architecture. It features 56 dedicated physical cores and 56 vCPUs with a 1.0 thread-per-core configuration, paired with 224.0 GB of system memory. The instance is equipped with two NVIDIA P4 GPUs providing a total of 16 GB of VRAM, but contains no local storage, relying instead on network-attached storage. It offers a 10 Gbps baseline network bandwidth. This hardware profile is suited for workloads such as machine learning inference, video transcoding, and parallel data processing that benefit from dedicated CPU cores and dual GPU acceleration.
